propositions: The auto-lander loop service must be containerized and deployed as a single instance via docker-compose on the existing Gerrit box.
The service must log to its own service logs and never write to session_log.
Failures (hang, error, stuck-state, lander_down) must be loudly visible via metrics and alarms for troubleshooting.
A state-volume heartbeat timestamp file is written once per 15s poll, with freshness treated as down at age over 90s exposed through a read-only HTTP status endpoint.
The service must guarantee crash-safe restart with autoheal, flock single-writer guard, drain-on-SIGTERM, and a concrete recovery record.
The bot requires provisioned credentials (SSM token) and a Gerrit Rebase capability on the rebar project without IAM changes.
